title: Dow Jones Futures: U.S.-Iran Conflict Sparks Market Upheaval As Nvidia Rallies; Credo, MongoDB Plunge Late
description: Dow Jones Futures: The start of the U.S.-Iran conflict sparked stock market upheaval Monday. Nvidia stock was a big mover. Credo and MongoDB plunged on earnings late.

title: Tesla gets some more good news from a key region
description: For Tesla, 2025 was a year to forget. Yes, the company finally launched its Tesla Robotaxi service after years of promises (though the couple dozen on the road are a far cry from the millions promised), but it also suffered reputational harm that many felt it wouldn't be able to fix.
